top_signals.title: Korea’s 5% Drop Shows Peril of Reliance on a Handful of Stocks
top_signals.summary: Supercharged gains in a handful of companies and weak market breadth are stoking concerns that the world’s hottest stock market is overheating in some pockets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
